title: centaurea scabiosa var. dumetorum
intro: Centaurea scabiosa var. dumetorum, also known as the scabious, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea scabiosa var. dumetorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, and it is also used in folk medicine to make poultices and salves for topical application.
